approach.phase1Description: Define scope, architecture, API contracts, and data flow. Choose stack deliberately: TypeScript, Node.js/NestJS, React/Next.js, PostgreSQL/MongoDB, and messaging where needed.
approach.phase2Description: Build features iteratively with code reviews and test coverage (unit/integration/e2e). Focus on reliability, clear ownership, and maintainable code that ships without regressions.
approach.phase3Description: Deploy through CI/CD using Docker and GitHub Actions. For mobile, deliver React Native apps with Expo/EAS (Build + OTA updates), manage env configs, and support production releases.

askBohdan.title: Ask Bohdan
askBohdan.triggerHint: AI assistant: experience, skills, projects, and contact

contactFlow.intro: Great, let's prepare your contact request for Bohdan.
contactFlow.askContact: Step 2/4: Share your contact (email, Telegram, LinkedIn, or phone).
contactFlow.askProposal: Step 3/4: Briefly describe your offer/project idea.
contactFlow.askCallTime: Step 4/4 (optional): Suggest a time for a call (e.g., Google Meet). Type 'skip' if not needed.
contactFlow.invalidName: Please provide a valid name (at least 2 characters).
contactFlow.invalidProposal: Please provide a bit more detail about your proposal (at least 10 characters).
contactFlow.abusive: I can help only with respectful professional contact requests. The contact flow has been stopped.
contactFlow.cancelled: Contact request flow has been cancelled. You can start again anytime.
contactFlow.success: Thank you. Your request has been sent to Bohdan in Telegram. Bohdan will definitely see your proposal and get back to you as soon as possible.
contactFlow.error: Could not send the request right now
